Gameflow

Game features

Here’s the breakdown of the next meme-styled gaming Mona Lisa

Join Clan

Team up with fellow memes to dominate over the whole of MemeFi

LOOT TOKENS

Farm bosses & pillage other clans to get your pockets filled with coins

Talk to Others

Private chats and clan chats give the game an even spicier spin

Get Stronger

Move up the ranks with XP & level progression to become the richest ape in meme lands

Dive into
the world of meme clicks

We’ve made a viral Telegram idle game, that has attracted a lot of attention from both Web2 and Web3 communities

Clan Ownership

Get your rewards sky-high by becoming an all-powerful memelord
Manage clan
Being a memelord, you’re in full control here: boss around until you’re out
Entry Fee
Keep the feeble weaklings out by setting the entry requirements & fee
Attack Clans
Your leadership shapes the world of gamefi: raid other clans to build up your treasury
Claim Rewards
As a leader, you distribute rewards and take commission fees from winnings

Get your share of the upcoming MemeFi Airdrop

MemeFi is now in the public Alpha Stage. Join & collect points for rewards from 9.5% of MEMEFI supply allocated for community!
Building Together

Our Partners

Projects we're collaborating with to ship a better Web3
Roadmap

DEVELOPMENT

What we’re going to do on our path to world domination
Q1 2023. Concept Development
  • Proof-of-Concept Testing
  • Gaming Market Research
  • Development Starts
Q2 2023. Preproduction
  • Major Game Mechanics Introduced
  • Onboarding New Expert Team Members
  • Smart Contracts Drafted & Enter Testing
  • Backend Architecture Ready
Q3 2023. Going Public
  • Playable Pre-Alpha Version Internal Release
  • Game Economy Development
  • Project Goes Public
  • Tapping Into The IguVerse Ecosystem: Airdrops & Benefits
  • Basic Game Mechanics Streamlined & Ready
  • Major Marketing Campaign
Q4 2023. Expansion & Game Finalization
  • Internal Alpha Version Release
  • App Optimization & Improvements
  • MVP Ready To Launch
